title: T-008 — POST /api/scanner/pin/setup + /pin/change with policy enforcement (06-a)
prompt:
# T-008 — PIN setup + change endpoints

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §6 D8, §8.1 FR-SC-BE-004/005, §12.2, §15.1 V-SCAN-LOGIN-001/003
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Land first-time PIN setup and self-service PIN change endpoints with admin-configurable complexity policy (length 4-6, forbid sequential/repeating, min unique digits).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/scanner/src/app/api/scanner/pin/setup/route.ts` (POST): authenticated; rejects if scanner_pin_hash already set. Body Zod `{ new_pin: string.regex(/^\d{4,6}$/) }`.
2. `apps/scanner/src/app/api/scanner/pin/change/route.ts` (POST): authenticated; body `{ old_pin, new_pin }`. Verify old via bcrypt then set new.
3. Policy module `apps/scanner/src/server/services/pin-policy.ts` exposing `validatePin(pin, policy)` returning `{ ok, errors[] }`. Reads org policy from `02-SETTINGS` config (forbid_sequential boolean, forbid_repeating boolean, min_unique_digits int default 3). Sequential check supports both 1234 and 4321 directions.
4. On success: bcrypt rounds 10, set users.scanner_pin_hash + pin_last_changed_at=now, clear pin_rotation_required, write audit row.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/scanner/pin/setup/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/scanner/pin/change/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/server/services/pin-policy.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/api/scanner-pin.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a user without scanner_pin_hash, when POST /pin/setup runs with new_pin='2647', then 200 and users.scanner_pin_hash is updated and pin_last_changed_at is set
2. Given org policy forbid_sequential=true, when POST /pin/setup is called with new_pin='1234', then 400 with error code SC_PIN_POLICY_VIOLATION and errors[] contains 'sequential'
3. Given a user with an existing PIN, when POST /pin/change runs with the wrong old_pin, then 401 SC_UNAUTHORIZED and the stored hash is unchanged

## Test strategy
- RED: write scanner-pin.test.ts asserting setup + sequential rejection + change-wrong-old before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test api/scanner-pin'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow setup if scanner_pin_hash is already set
- Do not log raw PIN values
- Do not weaken bcrypt rounds below 10

pipeline_inputs.description: Forced first-time PIN setup + self-service PIN change with admin-configurable complexity policy and bcrypt rounds 10.
pipeline_inputs.details: Two POST endpoints + a pin-policy service implementing forbid_sequential (1234/4321), forbid_repeating (1111), min_unique_digits (default 3) and length 4-6. Setup rejects if pin already exists; change requires bcrypt-verified old_pin. Both write audit rows and update pin_last_changed_at.
out_of_scope: Do not implement admin reset here (desktop 02-SETTINGS owns that)
Do not build the SCN-011b/c UI here (T-019, T-020)
Do not enforce forced rotation cron here
